description: MCP server for controlling HomeMatic smart home devices via the CCU JSON-RPC API
name: io.github.claymore666/ccu-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Hostname or IP of your HomeMatic CCU (debmatic, CCU3, or OpenCCU/RaspberryMatic)
environmentVariables.name: CCU_HOST

environmentVariables.description: CCU admin password (same as the WebUI login)
environmentVariables.name: CCU_PASSWORD

environmentVariables.description: Connect to the CCU via HTTPS (self-signed certificates supported)
environmentVariables.name: CCU_HTTPS

environmentVariables.description: CCU API port (80 for HTTP, 443 for HTTPS)
environmentVariables.name: CCU_PORT

environmentVariables.description: Directory for the device type cache and session persistence
environmentVariables.name: CACHE_DIR

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated allowlist of browser origins. Unset = no cross-origin browser access (default-deny). An allowlisted origin is reflected exactly in Access-Control-Allow-Origin (never '*'); the list also drives DNS-rebinding origin checks
environmentVariables.name: MCP_ALLOWED_ORIGINS

environmentVariables.description: Extra Host header values accepted by DNS-rebinding protection (comma-separated host:port); add your hostname when behind a proxy or container DNS name
environmentVariables.name: MCP_ALLOWED_HOSTS

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated names of multiple CCU targets (e.g. 'prod,dev'). Each profile takes the flat CCU_* settings prefixed CCU_<NAME>_ (CCU_PROD_HOST, ...), plus policy flags CCU_<NAME>_PROTECTED (writes need confirm:true) and CCU_<NAME>_READONLY. Unset = single default profile from the flat CCU_* vars
environmentVariables.name: CCU_PROFILES

environmentVariables.description: Which profile from CCU_PROFILES is active at startup (default: the first listed)
environmentVariables.name: CCU_DEFAULT_PROFILE
